zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret de Bohun於大約1162年出生在英國奧可福爾胡可 諾頓時，她的父親Humphrey II de Bohun54歲，母親Margaret of Gloucester40歲。她於1190年與Waleran de Beaumont 4th Earl of Warwick在英國瓦維其可爾沃里克結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1196年在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾沃里克沃里克 卡素享年36歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret de Bohun于大约1162年出生在英国奧可福爾胡可 諾頓时，她的父亲Humphrey II de Bohun54岁，母亲Margaret of Gloucester40岁。她于1190年与Waleran de Beaumont 4th Earl of Warwick在英国瓦維其可爾沃里克结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1196年在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾沃里克沃里克 卡素享年36岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bohun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Slovak (Behúň) and Rusyn (from Slovakia; also Behún): nickname from Slovak behúň (Rusyn bihun) ‘fast runner’.
Irish: from Ó Beachain or Ó Beathain, see Behan . This form of the surname is almost extinct in Britain.

variants.name: Behan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Conan, Aileen.
Irish (southern): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Beachain ‘descendant of Beachán’, a personal name from a diminutive of beach ‘bee’.
Irish (southern): perhaps from Ó Beathain ‘descendant of Beathán’, a personal name based on a diminutive of beatha ‘life’. Compare Bean 5 and McBeth .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret de Bohun was born about 1162, in Hook Norton, Oxfordshire, England, her father, Humphrey II de Bohun, was 54 and her mother, Margaret of Gloucester, was 40. She married Waleran de Beaumont 4th Earl of Warwick in 1190, in Warwick, Warwickshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died about 1196, in Warwick Castle, Warwick, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 36.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret de Bohun est née environ 1162, à Hook Norton, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Humphrey II de Bohun, avait 54 ans et sa mère, Margaret of Gloucester, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé Waleran de Beaumont 4th Earl of Warwick en 1190, à Warwick, Warwickshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1196, à Warwick Castle, Warwick, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 36 ans.

de.Warwick Castle, Warwick, Warwickshire, E: Warwick Castle, Warwick, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret de Bohun um 1162 in Hook Norton, Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Humphrey II de Bohun 54 und ihre Mutter Margaret of Gloucester 40. Sie hat 1190 in Warwick, Warwickshire, England Waleran de Beaumont 4th Earl of Warwick geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1196 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Warwick Castle, Warwick, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

Lei sposato Waleran de Beaumont 4th Earl of Warwick nel 1190, nel Warwick, Warwickshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. ko.Warwick Castle, Warwick, Warwickshire, E: 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 워윅 워윅 카스틀
ko.lifeSummary: Margaret de Bohun(이)가 대략 1162년 영국 스퍼드실르 훅 노르턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Humphrey II de Bohun(은)는 54세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret of Gloucester(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 1190년 영국 워윅실르 워윅에서 Waleran de Beaumont 4th Earl of Warwick(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1196년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 워윅 워윅 카스틀에서 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Waleran de Beaumont 4th Earl of Warwick em 1190, em Warwick, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. ru.Warwick Castle, Warwick, Warwickshire, E: варвикк кастл, варвикк, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret de Bohun родилась около 1162 г. в местности хук нортон, оксфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Humphrey II de Bohun было 54 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret of Gloucester, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Waleran de Beaumont 4th Earl of Warwick в 1190 г. в местности варвикк, варвиккшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1196 г. в местности варвикк кастл, варвикк, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 36 лет.
